description: A close-up view of two female hands held up prominently in the foreground, palms facing the camera and cupped to hold and display a generous amount of coarse white sea salt crystals glistening in the bright sunlight, with some salt spilling slightly over the edges; the hands have light skin tone, neatly manicured nails with a subtle pink hue, and visible tattoos on both wrists including script reading 'something' with a bird or arrow symbol on the right wrist; the background features a dramatic coastal seascape with tall, rugged limestone cliffs rising steeply on both sides, framing a narrow inlet of deep blue Mediterranean Sea water with white-capped waves crashing against rocky outcrops at the base; the sky is clear vibrant blue with no clouds, bright natural lighting suggesting midday sun casting sharp shadows on the rocks and highlighting the texture of the salt; the composition draws the eye from the tactile salt in the hands to the expansive natural archway of cliffs and sea beyond, emphasizing scale and serenity.
location_context: Clifftop overlooking sea inlet near Gozo, Malta based on rugged coastal geology and coordinates.
time_context: Mid-morning around 10:33 AM in late July, clear bright sunlight.
